mapper.select: select reminder_id, user_id, source_type, source_id, reminder_title, reminder_content, remind_time, read_status, read_time, create_time, update_time from oa_reminder where user_id = #{userId} and read_status = '0' order by remind_time desc, reminder_id desc limit #{limit}
select count(1) from oa_reminder where user_id = #{userId} and read_status = '0'
mapper.update: update oa_reminder set read_status = '1', read_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate() where reminder_id = #{reminderId} and user_id = #{userId} and read_status = '0'
update oa_reminder set read_status = '1', read_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and read_status = '0'
mapper.insert: insert ignore into oa_reminder ( user_id, source_type, source_id, reminder_title, reminder_content, remind_time, read_status, create_time, update_time ) select s.owner_id, 'schedule', s.schedule_id, concat('日程提醒：', s.schedule_title), left(concat('日程“', s.schedule_title, '”即将开始，开始时间：', ifnull(date_format(s.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), '-'), case when s.remark is not null and s.remark != '' then concat('，备注：', s.remark) else '' end), 500), s.remind_time, '0', sysdate(), sysdate() from oa_schedule s where s.schedule_status = 'pending' and s.remind_time is not null and s.remind_time <= sysdate() and not exists ( select 1 from oa_reminder r where r.user_id = s.owner_id and r.source_type = 'schedule' and r.source_id = s.schedule_id )

insert ignore into oa_reminder ( user_id, source_type, source_id, reminder_title, reminder_content, remind_time, read_status, create_time, update_time ) select m.organizer_id, 'meeting', m.meeting_id, concat('会议提醒：', m.meeting_title), concat('会议“', m.meeting_title, '”将在15分钟内开始，会议室：', ifnull(r.room_name, '-'), '，开始时间：', ifnull(date_format(m.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), '-')), date_sub(m.start_time, interval 15 minute), '0', sysdate(), sysdate() from oa_meeting m left join oa_meeting_room r on m.room_id = r.room_id where m.meeting_status = 'scheduled' and m.start_time is not null and date_sub(m.start_time, interval 15 minute) <= sysdate() and (m.end_time is null or m.end_time >= sysdate()) and not exists ( select 1 from oa_reminder n where n.user_id = m.organizer_id and n.source_type = 'meeting' and n.source_id = m.meeting_id )
